text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand visual information from the world. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition, which identifies what is in a picture, and object detection, which locates specific items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, they are used in security systems to recognise faces and in smartphones to organise photos. Perhaps the most exciting application is in self-driving cars, where computer vision helps the vehicle identify pedestrians, traffic signs, and other vehicles. This allows the car to navigate safely and make decisions in real time.
